entries.title: FLIGHT FROM THE WORLD 4.4.18 on exodus 2:15
entries.excerpt: Thus did Moses flee from the face of Pharaoh, so that the royal palace would not defile him or royal power ensnare him. Indeed, he valued reproach for Christ as more precious than the riches of Egypt.

entries.title: Interrogation of Job and David 4.4.14 on exodus 2:15
entries.excerpt: Moses went out from Egypt and was made a prophet and sent back to the people that he might free their souls from the land of affliction.
